* '''Grand Finals:''''' November 3rd - 5th, 2023 at Koramangala Indoor Stadium, {{Flag|in}} Bengaluru ** 16 teams. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Champion}} of '''[[Skyesports/Championship/3.0|Championship 3.0]]''' *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Champion}} and {{bgcolortext|stayup|Runner-Up}} of '''[[Skyesports/Champions Series|Champions Series]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Champion}} of '''[[Skyesports/Skirmish Series/Season 2|Skirmish Series]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Champion}} of '''[[Battlegrounds Mobile India Series/2023|BGIS 2023]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 11
